headline: GM in talks to supply weapons parts to Lockheed Martin- WSJ
summary: Investing.com-- General Motors (NYSE:GM) is in talks with Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) to manufacture components for the defense contractor’s weapons systems, the Wall Street Journal reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.

raw.headline: GM in talks to supply weapons parts to Lockheed Martin- WSJ
raw.summary: Investing.com-- General Motors (NYSE:GM) is in talks with Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) to manufacture components for the defense contractor’s weapons systems, the Wall Street Journal reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.
